description: Code intelligence benchmark for fastmcp codebase (~766 files). Tests blast radius and semantic queries — the two categories where Glyphh adds value over grep/glob.

test_cases.query: I'm about to edit src/fastmcp/server/auth/oauth_proxy/proxy.py — what other files might break?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: OAuth proxy — high coupling

test_cases.query: I'm editing src/fastmcp/server/middleware/middleware.py — what else could be affected?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: middleware base — many dependents

test_cases.query: What files are affected if I change src/fastmcp/client/transports/sse.py?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: SSE transport — sibling transports + client

test_cases.query: I need to refactor src/fastmcp/tools/base.py — what else will need changes?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: tool base class — subclasses + server

test_cases.query: What breaks if I modify src/fastmcp/resources/template.py?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: resource template — resource system

test_cases.query: I'm changing the dependency injection in src/fastmcp/server/dependencies.py — what files could break?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: DI engine — 64 importers, core infrastructure

test_cases.query: What's affected if I refactor src/fastmcp/server/context.py?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: request context — passed through entire pipeline

test_cases.query: I need to modify src/fastmcp/server/providers/base.py — what else will need changes?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: provider base — all provider implementations depend on it

test_cases.query: What breaks if I change src/fastmcp/exceptions.py?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: exception hierarchy — 51 importers across server and client

test_cases.query: I'm editing src/fastmcp/server/auth/auth.py — what other files are affected?
test_cases.description: Blast radius: auth orchestrator — 43 importers, core auth system

test_cases.query: What handles OAuth consent and user approval flows?
test_cases.description: Semantic: OAuth consent flow (conceptual, no exact string match)

test_cases.query: How does the authentication middleware chain work?
test_cases.description: Semantic: auth middleware chain (conceptual)

test_cases.query: How does the server let an LLM call back into the application during a request?
test_cases.description: Semantic: sampling/callback flow — no keyword 'sampling' in query

test_cases.query: How does the system decide which tools and resources a specific user can see?
test_cases.description: Semantic: per-user capability filtering — spans auth, transforms, middleware

test_cases.query: Where is request routing and dispatch handled?
test_cases.description: Semantic: request routing (conceptual)

test_cases.query: What coordinates server startup, initialization, and graceful shutdown?
test_cases.description: Semantic: lifecycle orchestration — no keyword maps to 'lifespan'

test_cases.query: How does error propagation work from tools through middleware to the client?
test_cases.description: Semantic: cross-cutting error flow — spans tools, middleware, exceptions

test_cases.query: What files are involved in the visibility and access control system?
test_cases.description: Semantic: visibility/access control — cross-cutting concern spanning transforms and auth

test_cases.query: How does the provider system aggregate tools from multiple sources?
test_cases.description: Semantic: provider aggregation — architectural question about multi-source tools

test_cases.query: What handles background task execution and worker scheduling?
test_cases.description: Semantic: task system — no exact string match for 'scheduling'
